name: √ñzerden Plastik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: √É¬ñzerden Plastik Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and sells packaging products. The company offers insulated packaging and construction insulation products comprising bizofol; protective packaging products, such as air bubble film and bag, bubble wrap, and air bed; and in-box packaging systems, including airsafe and Ranpak paper cushioning systems. It also provides food packaging products, which consists of chocolate pad; metal packaging products; and supplementary products, such as PE foams, air dunnage, stretch film, box tapes, aluminium and reinforced tapes, masking tapes, PE film, reinforced PE films, protective films, invoice pockets, wrapping ropes, corrugated cardboards, straps, and removal boxes. The company was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
